Petition For:Accounting; Copies Of Estate Planning Instruments; Suspension, Removal,And Repla
Off Calendar Feb-04-2026 Continued To Apr-15-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Christopher Nagakawa appeared via zoom for Jay Vargas (petitioner).
Michael Liberman appeared via zoom for and with Lydia Vargas (trustee).

Mr. Nagakawa stated that he is requesting continuance, that they need to amend the trust to add another beneficiary. Mr. Liberman agrees to continue the matter.

The matter is continued to April 15, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

Petition For:Accounting; Copies Of Estate Planning Instruments; Suspension, Removal,And Repla
Off Calendar Oct-29-2025 Continued To Feb-04-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Christopher Nagakawa appeared via zoom for Jay Vargas (petitioner).
Michael Liberman appeared via zoom for Lydia Vargas (trustee).

Mr. Nagakawa stated that there are two properties at issue, and that he will be lodging the trust with the court. The matter is continued to January 28, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

judge: Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Deleon. Not reported.

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
10-29-25. Post Script.
The matter is continued to February 04, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Counsels' have been notified of the change.

Off Calendar Oct-21-2025 Continued To Oct-29-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For: 1 Accounting; 2 Copies Of Estate Planning Instruments; 3 Suspension, Removal,And Replacement Of Trustee; 4 Recovery Of Trust Property
Off Calendar Sep-02-2025 Continued To Oct-21-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Christopher Nagakawa for Jay Vargas (petitioner) (via zoom).
Lydia Vargas, Laura Valdez, and Reynaldo Vargas III (via zoom).

Discussion was held regarding Lydia, that objectors are seeking a medical evaluation for Lydia's dementia, that Lydia has been isolated from family members, and that objectors are seeking to retain counsel. The matter is continued to October 21, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Parties to file papers by October 7, 2025 or the objection will be deemed waived.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.
